items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 This game is absolutely amazing! One of
items.summary: This game is absolutely amazing! One of the best gachas available, even better than many more well-known titles. It has a fair rate pull and generous rewards, but the gameplay is the best thing about it. If you're unsure, I recommend giving it a try.
items.author: Erika Biagioni
